transport: Scooter/Bike Rental, Taxis (app & metered), Local Buses (KTC), Auto-Rickshaws
tip: Renting a scooter is the best way to explore Goa — parking is free almost everywhere.

transport: Auto-Rickshaws, Tuk-Tuks, City Buses, Camel/Horse Carts (heritage), Cab aggregators (Ola/Uber in cities)
tip: Agree on the fare before boarding autos. Uber/Ola available in Jaipur, Jodhpur, Udaipur.

transport: KSRTC Buses (extensive network), Autos, Cab apps, Houseboats, Ferries (backwaters), Local Boats
tip: Ferries across backwaters are scenic and very affordable — use them instead of road for short distances.

transport: HRTC Buses (affordable, scenic), Shared Taxis (jeeps), Private Cabs, Local Autos in towns
tip: For Spiti and remote areas, shared jeeps from Manali are the only practical option.

transport: E-Rickshaws (e-Autos), Autos, City Buses, Cycle Rickshaws (Old City), Boat rides on Ganga
tip: In Varanasi's old city, cycle rickshaws and walking are best — streets are too narrow for cars.

transport: Government Ferries (between islands), Private Speed Boats, Auto-Rickshaws, Scooter Rentals
tip: Book government ferry tickets in advance online — they sell out fast for Neil and Havelock islands.

transport: Chennai Metro, TNSTC Buses, Autos (metered), Ola/Uber, Share Autos
tip: Chennai autos are metered; insist on using the meter. Ola/Uber are reliable alternatives.

transport: Mumbai Local Trains (lifeline), BEST Buses, Metro, Autos, Taxis, Ola/Uber
tip: In Mumbai, local trains are the fastest way to get around — buy a day pass for unlimited trips.
